note: EU Bountiful: Wowhead TIW (regionId EU, mn-bountiful-delves). WoW day = 07:00 UTC. Clients ignore delves when reset !== current WoW day and use delves.js bountifulSchedule until CI updates this file.

EU Bountiful from Wowhead TIW: script#data.wow.todayInWow JSON, regionId EU, widget id mn-bountiful-delves → content.lines. WoW day = 07:00 UTC. Fallback: marker-window scrape then delves.js bountifulSchedule.
